paywall.heroSubtitle:
Unlock all difficulty levels
for 6 ear training categories
paywall.currentPro: You are currently on the Pro plan
paywall.ctaNote: Cancel anytime · Charged immediately upon first payment
paywall.disclaimer:
Subscriptions are processed through Google Play / App Store.
You may cancel up to 24 hours before the next renewal date.
Payment will be charged to your iTunes / Google Play account upon confirmation.

paywall.alreadyProMsg: You are already on the Pro plan.

upgrade.grandStaffDesc: The Grand Staff (treble + bass clef) for piano sheet music is available on Pro.
upgrade.examModeDesc: Measure-by-measure playback mode simulating a real exam environment is available on Pro.
upgrade.difficultyDesc: Difficulty levels above beginner are available on Pro.
upgrade.measuresDesc: Generating more than 4 measures is available on Pro.
upgrade.editNotesDesc: Editing notes in generated scores is available on the Pro plan.
upgrade.downloadAudioDesc: Downloading ear training audio (MP3) is a Pro-exclusive feature.
downloadAudioBenefits: Unlimited audio and score image saves
upgrade.downloadImageDesc: Saving score images (PNG) is a Pro-exclusive feature.
downloadImageBenefits: Unlimited PNG image saves to gallery
upgrade.saveScoresDesc:
You have reached the score save limit for your current plan.
Free: 5 scores · Pro: 20 scores
upgrade.keySignatureDesc:
The Free plan only supports C major.
Upgrade to Pro to use all major and minor keys.
upgrade.timeSignatureDesc:
The Free plan only supports 4/4 time.
Upgrade to Pro to use all time signatures.
upgrade.downloadLimitDesc:
You have used all your downloads for this month.
Upgrade to Pro for unlimited downloads.
